other_observers: Steve Brown and Bill Maynard also saw the bird in hand; none
description: This notoriously hard ID was made in hand after running through the Pyle Alder/Willow differentiation formula. This bird fell well within the range of ALFL. unfortunately those measurements are in CO right now and I am in TX. Thay can be accessed at a later date. Visually this bird was strikingly greenish-colored on the back. Much more green tones than the typical olive-gray of willow flycatchers. The crown had some dark centers to the feathers another ALFL character.Behaviors: bird in handCall: nonePlumage: Definitive
photographer: Photographer: Brian Gibbons, Brian Gibbons, Brian Gibbons, Brian Gibbons
